meaning: n.[鍖籡绮惧瓙缂轰箯,绮惧瓙缂轰箯娲诲姏
examples: One of the important reasons of male infertility is azoospermia and dead spermatozoa.
Clinical Material and Methods: 38 male infertility patients with azoospermia were selected.
Objective: In order to establish a method to detect the abnormal YRRM1 gene in azoospermia.
